description: The stable root node of one JSON document. Scalar JSON is stored as text so durable snapshots remain number-free.

id.description: The constant identity of the document root.

kind.description: The JSON node kind. Object and array roots carry their content in child entities.

scalar_json.description: The complete raw JSON scalar encoded as text. Omitted for object and array roots.

prefix_json.description: Exact outer JSON whitespace before the root value. Omitted when empty.

suffix_json.description: Exact outer JSON whitespace after the root value. Omitted when empty.

empty_json.description: Exact whitespace inside an empty root object or array. Omitted for non-empty containers and scalars.
